== Notes for [[Item:Q88245|Q88245]] ==

Died : omk 320 BC
--------------------
Died : omk 320 BC
--------------------
Died : omk 320 BC
--------------------
Died : omk 320 BC

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per09764.htm#0

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
